title: BloodBound
description: A nice little Minecraft mod that ads some new resources
body:
🩸 Bloodbound – The Dark Evolution of Minecraft

Bloodbound is a mysterious, sci-fi-horror-inspired expansion that infects your Minecraft world with powerful new materials and eerie transformations. A virus has escaped from the depths of the Nether... and nothing will ever be the same.

🔬 Features

- Virus in a Jar: A dangerous specimen—contain it, or unleash it.
- Virus Dust: The powdered essence of infection. Strange and potent.
- Viranium: A rare, corrupted ore with supernatural properties.
- Viranium Ingot: Refined Viranium—used to craft powerful tools.
- Viranium Tools:
  - 🗡️ Sword – slices through the toughest defenses
  - ⛏️ Pickaxe – mine with deadly efficiency
  - 🪓 Axe – chop with corrupted power
  - 🪠 Shovel – dig like a viral specialist
  - 🌾 Hoe – for sinister farming

🧱 Infected Blocks

- Infected Stone – the virus has reached the Overworld
- Infected Netherrack – the source of the outbreak
- Infected Endstone – even the End is no longer safe...

⚠️ Beware: The infection is spreading...

Bloodbound is more than a mod—it's a mystery, a challenge, a descent into viral chaos. Will you master the corruption, or be consumed by it?

[The BloodBound Website](https://notbonniegamer.github.io/BloodBound-Website/)
